route.rawPrompt: Create an interactive HTML artifact that explains a product rollout with charts for an Instacart MCP

artifactBrief.jobToBeDone: understand the product rollout process and key metrics for decision-making
artifactBrief.artifactThesis: Provide an interactive overview of the product rollout with relevant charts to aid in strategic planning.
requiredInteractions: hover to view details to reveal shared detail in the visible detail panel
click to expand sections to switch the visible evidence view
factualAnchors: key performance indicators (KPIs) for the product launch
timeline of major milestones in the rollout process

candidateSummaries.summary: Interactive Overview of the Product Rollout with Key Metrics

judge.rationale: Candidate meets all requirements, including interactive elements and relevant data visualizations.
